items.briefing:
A critical zero-day vulnerability in Microsoft Exchange is currently being actively exploited, with no patch yet available from Microsoft. Australian organisations using Exchange — whether on-premises or hybrid setups — should be on high alert and monitor for any unusual email system activity. Separately, a new report highlights that security concerns remain the biggest obstacle to AI adoption in Australian workplaces, a reminder that staff should follow your organisation's approved guidelines before using any AI tools with sensitive data.

**Practical tip:** If your organisation runs Microsoft Exchange, contact your IT team today to confirm monitoring is in place and ask about any temporary mitigations while a patch is developed.
